From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

(Redirected from [Laim](/w/index.php?title=Laim&redirect=no "Laim"))

Divisions of the German city

Since the administrative reform in 1992, **[Munich](/wiki/Munich "Munich")** ([German](/wiki/German_language "German language"): *München*) has been divided into 25 [boroughs](/wiki/Borough "Borough") or *Stadtbezirke*:
